# Wine Import & Distribution ERP — AI Context Index
> Last updated: 2026-03-09 04:00
> Status: Production — 26 modules, 113 DB models, 33 dashboard routes, 6 AI features live

## Core Files (MUST READ IN ORDER)
- docs/README.md — Project overview, module list, doc-update rules
- docs/architecture/data-flow.md — Database constraints (NEVER violate)
- docs/architecture/module-dependencies.md — Domain ownership rules
- docs/bug-fix-lessons.md — 25 rules from 13 bugs (MUST READ before coding)
- CODEBASE.md — Code conventions, modular boundaries, workflow

## Tech Stack (Verified)
- Next.js 16.1.6 (App Router) + React 19.2.3 + TypeScript
- Prisma 7.4.2 + Supabase PostgreSQL (113 models, 71 enums)
- TailwindCSS v4 + Shadcn UI (Radix)
- Supabase Auth (@supabase/ssr) — NOT NextAuth
- ImgBB (product images) + Supabase Storage (private docs)
- Server Actions — NOT tRPC
- Vercel deploy + GitHub CI/CD

## Module Registry (26 modules)
SYS (RBAC/Auth) | MDM (Products/Suppliers/Customers) | CRM (360° + Pipeline)
CNT (Contracts + RegDocs) | TAX (Tax Rates) | PRC (Procurement)
SHP (Shipment Tracking) | CST (Product Costing) | AGN (Agency Portal)
WMS (Warehouse + Transfers + StockCount) | QRC (QR Traceability)
SLS (Sales + Quotations[PDF/Email/ViewTracking] + PriceList + Allocation) | POS (Showroom Retail)
CSG (Consignment HORECA) | TRS (Delivery + E-POD) | FIN (Finance + Declarations)
STP (Wine Stamps) | RPT (Reports + BI) | DSH (CEO Dashboard) | KPI (Targets)
AI (6 live: Pipeline/CRM/Catalog Analysis + CEO Briefing + Admin Toggle + Prompt Editor) | TLG (Telegram Bot) | MKT (Media Library)
PRO (Proposals) | APM (Approval Matrix) | RTN (Returns + Credit Notes)

## Wine-Specific Concepts
- Vintage: Year of grape harvest — affects pricing, allocation
- Appellation/AOC: Certified wine region (Bordeaux, Burgundy...)
- ABV%: Alcohol By Volume — <20° = 35% SCT; ≥20° = 65% SCT (Vietnam tax)
- Landed Cost: CIF + Import Tax + SCT + VAT + Logistics = True unit cost
- Allocation: Quota for scarce Grand Cru wines to VIP customers/reps
- Consignment: Company-owned stock placed at HORECA venues
- EVFTA: EU-Vietnam FTA — reduced import tax with EUR.1 C/O
- HS Code: Customs classification for wine (typically 2204.xx)

## Key Architecture Decisions
- Modular-first: Each module has own actions.ts, can be enabled/disabled
- Soft Delete: Products, Customers, Suppliers use deletedAt (NEVER hard delete)
- FIFO Strategy: WMS picks oldest lots first for delivery
- pgBouncer Transaction mode (port 6543) for Vercel serverless
- ISR stagger: Dashboard 30s, frequent 45s, normal 60s, rare 90s
- Server-side LRU cache (500 entries max) with module-prefix invalidation
- Auth Guards: requireAuth() + requirePermission() for all mutations
- Serialization: serialize() utility (src/lib/serialize.ts) for Prisma Decimal/BigInt
- Structured error returns: { success, data/error } — never throw from Server Actions
- Env validation: crash-early if critical vars missing (src/lib/env.ts)
- AI Management: AiSystemConfig singleton (aiEnabled + allowedModules), AiReport (save/pin/archive), AiPromptTemplate (DB-driven prompts with {{data}} placeholder)
- AI Toggle: useAiStatus('module') client hook + isModuleAiEnabled() server check → 403 when disabled
- AI Prompt Resolution: resolvePromptTemplate(slug) → DB template or hardcoded fallback

## Documentation Update Rules
When making code changes, AI agents MUST update:
1. Module spec file if adding features → docs/modules/<module>.md
2. README.md module table if adding new module/route
3. llms.txt if making significant changes
4. bug-fix-lessons.md if fixing important bugs
5. architecture/ files if changing schema/tech stack
